base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_6_clock_tower_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 castlevania. Level 6 Clock Tower — iconic gear-platforming. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Level 6 Clock Tower — iconic gear-platforming; Medusa-Heads dense population; timed jumps onto rotating cogs. Leads to Dracula-Door
